allow: PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -match 'python' } | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, Path, StartTime, MainWindowTitle | Format-Table -AutoSize)
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process -Name py,python* -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,ProcessName,StartTime,MainWindowTitle | Format-Table -AutoSize")
Bash(py -3 -m py_compile src/layouts/panels/brush/panel.py src/layouts/panels/brush/asset_browser.py src/layouts/mediator.py src/layouts/main_layout.py src/layouts/panels/toolbar.py)
